generatedConfig.dockerComposeService:
flowplane-flink-jobmanager:
  image: flink:1.20.2-scala_2.12-java17
  container_name: flowplane-flink-jobmanager
  networks:
    - flowplane-quality-stack_default
  environment:
    FLOWPLANE_CONTROL_PLANE_URL: "http://flowplane-backend:8080"
    FLOWPLANE_TENANT_ID: "acme-corp"
    FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_ID: "flink-evidence-20260720t174759z"
    FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_NAME: "Flink Evidence 20260720T174759Z"
    FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_TYPE: "FLINK"
    FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_ENVIRONMENT: "DEVELOPMENT"
    FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_OWNER_TEAM: "Quality Engineering"
    FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_PROJECT_ID: "live-local-verification"
    FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_PRODUCTION_MODE: "true"
    FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_CLIENT_SECRET: "${FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_CLIENT_SECRET}"
    FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS: "kafka:9092"
    FLOWPLANE_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL: "http://schema-registry:8081"
    FLOWPLANE_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_BASIC_AUTH_USER_INFO: "${FLOWPLANE_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_BASIC_AUTH_USER_INFO}"
    FLOWPLANE_INPUT_TOPIC: "flowplane.flink.evidence.20260720t174759z.raw"
    FLOWPLANE_OUTPUT_TOPIC: "flowplane.flink.evidence.20260720t174759z.transformed"
    FLOWPLANE_ERROR_TOPIC: "flowplane.flink.evidence.20260720t174759z.dlq"
    FLOWPLANE_SIDECAR_URL: ""
    FLOWPLANE_ASSIGNMENT_POLL_INTERVAL_MS: "1000"
    FLOWPLANE_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS: "10000"
    FLOWPLANE_OUTPUT_SHAPE: "JSON_STRING"
    FLOWPLANE_OUTPUT_COMPLEX_TYPES: "NATIVE_JSON"
    FLOWPLANE_OUTPUT_FIELD_NAMING: "AS_IS"
    FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_ENABLED: "false"
    FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS: "kafka:9092"
    FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SECURITY_PROTOCOL: "${FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SECURITY_PROTOCOL}"
    FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SASL_MECHANISM: "${FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SASL_MECHANISM}"
    FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SASL_JAAS_CONFIG: "${FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SASL_JAAS_CONFIG}"
    FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SSL_TRUSTSTORE_LOCATION: "${FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SSL_TRUSTSTORE_LOCATION}"
    FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SSL_TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD: "${FLOWPLANE_REPLAY_KAFKA_SSL_TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}"
  command: >-
    flink run -d -c com.flowplane.flink.FlowPlaneKafkaFlinkJob /opt/flowplane/flowplane-flink-runtime-job.jar --bootstrap.servers="${FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS}" --input.topic="${FLOWPLANE_INPUT_TOPIC}" --output.topic="${FLOWPLANE_OUTPUT_TOPIC}" --error.topic="${FLOWPLANE_ERROR_TOPIC}" --group.id="${FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_ID}" --control-plane.url="${FLOWPLANE_CONTROL_PLANE_URL}" --runtime.id="${FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_ID}" --runtime.name="${FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_NAME}" --runtime.environment="${FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_ENVIRONMENT}" --runtime.owner.team="${FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_OWNER_TEAM}" --runtime.project.id="${FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_PROJECT_ID}" --tenant.id="${FLOWPLANE_TENANT_ID}" --runtime.client.secret="${FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_CLIENT_SECRET}" --kafka.property.security.protocol="${FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_SECURITY_PROTOCOL}" --kafka.property.sasl.mechanism="${FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_SASL_MECHANISM}" --kafka.property.sasl.jaas.config="${FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_SASL_JAAS_CONFIG}" --kafka.property.ssl.truststore.location="${FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_SSL_TRUSTSTORE_LOCATION}" --kafka.property.ssl.truststore.password="${FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_SSL_TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}" --kafka.property.ssl.keystore.location="${FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_SSL_KEYSTORE_LOCATION}" --kafka.property.ssl.keystore.password="${FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_SSL_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}" --kafka.property.ssl.key.password="${FLOWPLANE_KAFKA_SSL_KEY_PASSWORD}" --schema-registry.url="${FLOWPLANE_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL}" --schema-registry.basic-auth.user-info="${FLOWPLANE_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_BASIC_AUTH_USER_INFO}"

notes: Runtime registration is outbound-first: runtime authenticates to the control plane, fetches assignments, then heartbeats.
Store the one-time clientSecret response value in a secret manager as FLOWPLANE_RUNTIME_CLIENT_SECRET; generated snippets intentionally use a placeholder and must not be committed with raw secrets.
Rotate the runtime credential from the control plane, update the secret-manager value, and restart or reload the runtime to pick up the new secret.
Runtime assignment caches are encrypted and authenticated; plaintext cache envelopes are always rejected.
